EGFR_PACC.mechanism: Atypical structural alterations in the kinase domain lead to variable and often reduced binding affinity for first-, second-, and third-generation TKIs. These mutations compress the ATP-binding pocket in a distinct configuration not targeted by standard osimertinib.
EGFR_PACC.drug_sensitivity: Resistant to standard TKIs; may respond to 4th-generation allosteric inhibitors.
EGFR_PACC.trial_rationale: Firmonertinib demonstrates preclinical and early clinical activity against PACC mutations due to its unique binding conformation.
EGFR_PACC.citation: Le X, et al. FURTHER: A Global, Randomized Study of Firmonertinib vs. Chemotherapy in EGFR PACC Mutation-Positive NSCLC. ASCO 2024.

HER2_ADC_Resistance.mechanism: Antibody-Drug Conjugate (ADC) payload resistance: SLFN11 loss impairs DNA damage response to the DXd topoisomerase I inhibitor payload, while ABCC1 gain drives active efflux of the cytotoxic payload from tumor cells. Critically, the HER2 receptor itself and downstream kinase activity remain intact and actionable.
HER2_ADC_Resistance.drug_sensitivity: Resistant to T-DXd (trastuzumab deruxtecan) payload; tumor remains sensitive to HER2 kinase inhibition.
HER2_ADC_Resistance.trial_rationale: Bypasses the ADC resistance mechanism entirely by directly targeting the preserved HER2 kinase activity rather than relying on cytotoxic payload delivery.
HER2_ADC_Resistance.citation: Le X, et al. First Comprehensive Investigation of ADC Resistance Mechanisms in Lung Cancer. JTO 2024.

MET_Amplification.alteration: High-level amplification (MET/CEP7 ratio ≥ 5 or copy number ≥ 10)
MET_Amplification.mechanism: MET amplification constitutes a bypass track resistance mechanism to EGFR TKI therapy. Amplified MET activates PI3K/AKT and RAS/MAPK signaling independently of EGFR, rendering EGFR inhibition insufficient as a monotherapy. This is one of the most common acquired resistance mechanisms to osimertinib (~15% of cases).
MET_Amplification.drug_sensitivity: Resistant to EGFR TKI monotherapy; responds to combined EGFR + MET co-inhibition.
MET_Amplification.trial_rationale: Dual blockade of both the EGFR pathway (osimertinib) and the MET bypass track simultaneously overcomes the resistance mechanism.
MET_Amplification.citation: Sequist LV, et al. INSIGHT-2: Osimertinib plus Savolitinib in EGFR-mutated, MET-amplified NSCLC post-Osimertinib Resistance. NEJM 2023.
